623: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_request', 'Fork request requires a target object');
624: +  }

626: +  const owner = String((target as Record<string, unknown>).owner ?? '').trim();
627: +  const repo = String((target as Record<string, unknown>).repo ?? '').trim();
628: +  const branchRaw = (target as Record<string, unknown>).branch;
629: +  const branch = typeof branchRaw === 'string' ? branchRaw.trim() : undefined;
630: +  if (!owner || !repo) {
631: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_request', 'Fork request target requires owner and repo');
632: +  }
633: +
634: +  const commitInput = payload.commit;
635: +  let commitMessage: string | undefined;
636: +  if (commitInput && typeof commitInput === 'object' && !Array.isArray(commitInput)) {
637: +    const maybeMessage = (commitInput as Record<string, unknown>).message;
638: +    if (typeof maybeMessage === 'string' && maybeMessage.trim()) {
639: +      commitMessage = maybeMessage.trim();
640: +    }
641: +  }
642: +
643: +  const installationIdRaw = payload.installationId;
644: +  let installationId: number | undefined;
645: +  if (typeof installationIdRaw === 'number' && Number.isFinite(installationIdRaw)) {

696: +async function createGitHubAppJwt(env: Env): Promise<string> {
697: +  if (env.GITHUB_APP_JWT && env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim()) {
698: +    return env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim();
699: +  }
700: +
701: +  if (!env.GITHUB_APP_ID || !env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY) {
702: +    throw new OperationPreflightError(
703: +      'configuration_missing',
704: +      'GITHUB_APP_ID and GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY are required for GitHub fork operations'
705: +    );
706: +  }
707: +
708: +  const issuedAt = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) - 30;
709: +  const payload = {
710: +    iat: issuedAt,
711: +    exp: issuedAt + 9 * 60,
712: +    iss: env.GITHUB_APP_ID,
713: +  };
714: +
715: +  const headerPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify({ alg: 'RS256', typ: 'JWT' }));
716: +  const payloadPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify(payload));

719: +  const pem = env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY.replace(/\\n/g, '\n').trim();
720: +  let signaturePart: string;
721: +  try {
722: +    const signer = createSign('RSA-SHA256');
723: +    signer.update(signingInput);
724: +    signer.end();

727: +  } catch (error) {

729: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('configuration_invalid', `Invalid GitHub App private key: ${message}`);
730: +  }

732: +  return `${signingInput}.${signaturePart}`;

735: +async function githubRequest<T>(env: Env, path: string, options: GithubRequestOptions): Promise<T> {
736: +  const baseUrl = (env.GITHUB_API_BASE_URL ?? 'https://api.github.com').replace(/\/+$/, '');
737: +  const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${path}`, {
738: +    method: options.method ?? 'GET',
739: +    headers: {
740: +      Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
741: +      Authorization: `Bearer ${options.token}`,
742: +      'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
743: +      ...(options.body ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } : {}),
744: +    },
745: +    body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,
746: +  });
747: +
748: +  if (response.status === 204) {
749: +    return undefined as T;
750: +  }
751: +
752: +  let json: unknown;
753: +  try {
754: +    json = await response.json();
755: +  } catch {
756: +    json = null;
757: +  }
758: +
759: +  if (!response.ok) {
760: +    const apiError = json as GitHubApiErrorShape | null;
761: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('github_api_error', apiError?.message || 'GitHub API request failed', {
762: +      path,
763: +      status: response.status,
764: +    });
765: +  }
766: +
767: +  return json as T;
768: +}

832: +async function resolveBranchForFork(
833: +  env: Env,
834: +  token: string,
835: +  owner: string,
836: +  repo: string,
837: +  requestedBranch: string | undefined,
838: +  workspaceId: string
839: +): Promise<{ branch: string; explicit: boolean }> {
840: +  const explicit = Boolean(requestedBranch && requestedBranch.trim().length > 0);
841: +  const branchBase = sanitizeBranchName(requestedBranch?.trim() || getDefaultForkBranch(workspaceId));
842: +  if (explicit) {
843: +    try {
844: +      await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(branchBase)}`, {
845: +        token,
846: +      });
847: +      throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Requested branch already exists', {
848: +        branch: branchBase,
849: +      });
850: +    } catch (error) {
851: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
852: +        const details = error.details ?? {};
853: +        if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
854: +          return { branch: branchBase, explicit: true };
855: +        }
856: +      }
857: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'branch_exists') {
858: +        throw error;
859: +      }
860: +      throw error;
861: +    }
862: +  }
863: +
864: +  let candidate = branchBase;
865: +  for (let index = 1; index <= 50; index += 1) {
866: +    try {
867: +      await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(candidate)}`, {
868: +        token,
869: +      });
870: +      candidate = `${branchBase}-${index + 1}`;
871: +    } catch (error) {
872: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
873: +        const details = error.details ?? {};
874: +        if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
875: +          return { branch: candidate, explicit: false };
876: +        }
877: +      }
878: +      throw error;
879: +    }
880: +  }
881: +
882: +  throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Unable to allocate non-colliding generated branch');
883: +}

1865: +): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1866: +  const now = new Date().toISOString();
1867: +  const existingIdempotency = await db
1868: +    .prepare(
1869: +      `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1870: +       FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1871: +       WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1872: +       LIMIT 1`
1873: +    )
1874: +    .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1875: +    .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1876: +
1877: +  if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1878: +    if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1879: +      throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1880: +    }
1881: +
1882: +    const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1883: +    if (!existingOperation) {
1884: +      throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1885: +    }
1886: +    return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1887: +  }
1888: +
1889: +  if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1890: +    await db
1891: +      .prepare(
1892: +        `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1893: +         WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1894: +      )
1895: +      .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1896: +      .run();
1897: +  }
1898: +
1899: +  const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1900: +  const operationId = input.id;
1901: +
1902: +  const operationRecord = await db
1903: +    .prepare(
1904: +      `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1905: +         id,
1906: +         workspace_id,
1907: +         type,
1908: +         status,
1909: +         actor_id,
1910: +         auth_principal_json,
1911: +         request_payload_json,
1912: +         request_payload_sha256,
1913: +         idempotency_key,
1914: +         warnings_json
1915: +       )
1916: +       VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1917: +       RETURNING *`
1918: +    )
1919: +    .bind(
1920: +      operationId,
1921: +      input.workspaceId,
1922: +      input.type,
1923: +      input.actorId ?? null,
1924: +      JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1925: +      JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1926: +      input.requestPayloadSha256,
1927: +      input.idempotencyKey
1928: +    )
1929: +    .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1930: +
1931: +  if (!operationRecord) {
1932: +    throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1933: +  }
1934: +
1935: +  try {
1936: +    await db
1937: +      .prepare(
1938: +        `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1939: +           id,
1940: +           workspace_id,
1941: +           operation_type,
1942: +           idempotency_key,
1943: +           operation_id,
1944: +           request_payload_sha256,
1945: +           expires_at
1946: +         )
1947: +         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1948: +      )
1949: +      .bind(
1950: +        generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1951: +        input.workspaceId,
1952: +        input.type,
1953: +        input.idempotencyKey,
1954: +        operationId,

1963: +    }
1964: +
1965: +    const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1966: +      .prepare(
1967: +        `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1968: +         FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1969: +         WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1970: +         LIMIT 1`
1971: +      )
1972: +      .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1973: +      .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1974: +
1975: +    if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1976: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();

1978: +    }
1979: +    if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {

1982: +    }
1983: +
1984: +    const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1985: +    if (!existingOperation) {
1986: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1987: +      throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1988: +    }

1991: +  }

1993: +  return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };

2033: +export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
2034: +  db: D1Database,
2035: +  operationId: string,
2036: +  status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
2037: +  options?: {
2038: +    result?: unknown;
2039: +    warnings?: unknown[];
2040: +    errorCode?: string | null;
2041: +    errorClass?: string | null;
2042: +    errorMessage?: string | null;
2043: +    errorDetails?: unknown;
2044: +    startedAt?: string | null;
2045: +    finishedAt?: string | null;
2046: +  }
2047: +): Promise<void> {
2048: +  const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2049: +  const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2050: +
2051: +  if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2052: +    updates.push('started_at = ?');
2053: +    values.push(options.startedAt);
2054: +  }
2055: +  if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2056: +    updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2057: +    values.push(options.finishedAt);
2058: +  }
2059: +  if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2060: +    updates.push('result_json = ?');
2061: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2062: +  }
2063: +  if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
2064: +    updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
2065: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
2066: +  }
2067: +  if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2068: +    updates.push('error_code = ?');
2069: +    values.push(options.errorCode);
2070: +  }
2071: +  if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
2072: +    updates.push('error_class = ?');
2073: +    values.push(options.errorClass);
2074: +  }
2075: +  if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2076: +    updates.push('error_message = ?');
2077: +    values.push(options.errorMessage);
2078: +  }
2079: +  if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
2080: +    updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
2081: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
2082: +  }
2083: +  if (status === 'running') {
2084: +    updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
2085: +    values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2086: +  }
2087: +  if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
2088: +    updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2089: +    values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2090: +    updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2091: +    const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
2092: +    values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
2093: +  }
2094: +
2095: +  values.push(operationId);
2096: +
2097: +  await db
2098: +    .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
2099: +    .bind(...values)
2100: +    .run();
2101: +}

442: function base64UrlEncodeString(value: string): string {
443:   return btoa(value).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/g, '');

446: function base64UrlEncodeBytes(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
447:   let binary = '';
448:   for (const byte of bytes) {
449:     binary += String.fromCharCode(byte);
450:   }
451: 
452:   return btoa(binary).replace(/\+/g, '-').replace(/\//g, '_').replace(/=+$/g, '');
453: }

455: async function createGitHubAppJwt(env: Env): Promise<string> {
456:   if (env.GITHUB_APP_JWT && env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim()) {
457:     return env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim();
458:   }
459: 
460:   if (!env.GITHUB_APP_ID || !env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY) {
461:     throw new OperationPreflightError(
462:       'configuration_missing',
463:       'GITHUB_APP_ID and GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY are required for GitHub fork operations'
464:     );
465:   }
466: 
467:   const issuedAt = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) - 30;
468:   const payload = {
469:     iat: issuedAt,
470:     exp: issuedAt + 9 * 60,
471:     iss: env.GITHUB_APP_ID,
472:   };
473: 
474:   const headerPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify({ alg: 'RS256', typ: 'JWT' }));
475:   const payloadPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify(payload));
476:   const signingInput = `${headerPart}.${payloadPart}`;
477: 
478:   const pem = env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY.replace(/\\n/g, '\n').trim();
479:   let signaturePart: string;
480:   try {
481:     const signer = createSign('RSA-SHA256');
482:     signer.update(signingInput);
483:     signer.end();
484:     const signature = signer.sign(pem);
485:     signaturePart = base64UrlEncodeBytes(new Uint8Array(signature));
486:   } catch (error) {
487:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
488:     throw new OperationPreflightError('configuration_invalid', `Invalid GitHub App private key: ${message}`);
489:   }
490: 
491:   return `${signingInput}.${signaturePart}`;
492: }

494: async function githubRequest<T>(env: Env, path: string, options: GithubRequestOptions): Promise<T> {
495:   const baseUrl = (env.GITHUB_API_BASE_URL ?? 'https://api.github.com').replace(/\/+$/, '');
496:   const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${path}`, {
497:     method: options.method ?? 'GET',
498:     headers: {
499:       Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
500:       Authorization: `Bearer ${options.token}`,
501:       'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
502:       ...(options.body ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } : {}),
503:     },
504:     body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,
505:   });
506: 
507:   if (response.status === 204) {
508:     return undefined as T;
509:   }
510: 
511:   let json: unknown;
512:   try {
513:     json = await response.json();
514:   } catch {
515:     json = null;
516:   }
517: 
518:   if (!response.ok) {
519:     const apiError = json as GitHubApiErrorShape | null;
520:     throw new OperationPreflightError('github_api_error', apiError?.message || 'GitHub API request failed', {
521:       path,
522:       status: response.status,
523:     });
524:   }
525: 
526:   return json as T;
527: }

529: function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {

531:   const mm = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
532:   const dd = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
533:   const hh = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');
534:   const min = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
535:   const sec = String(date.getUTCSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
536:   return `${yyyy}${mm}${dd}-${hh}${min}${sec}`;
537: }

539: function sanitizeBranchName(input: string): string {

543:     .replace(/-+/g, '-')
544:     .replace(/\/+/g, '/')
545:     .replace(/_+/g, '_')

549:   const clamped = normalized.slice(0, 240);

551:     throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_branch', 'Computed branch name is empty after sanitization');

554:   return clamped;

591: async function resolveBranchForFork(
592:   env: Env,
593:   token: string,
594:   owner: string,
595:   repo: string,
596:   requestedBranch: string | undefined,
597:   workspaceId: string
598: ): Promise<{ branch: string; explicit: boolean }> {
599:   const explicit = Boolean(requestedBranch && requestedBranch.trim().length > 0);
600:   const branchBase = sanitizeBranchName(requestedBranch?.trim() || getDefaultForkBranch(workspaceId));
601:   if (explicit) {
602:     try {
603:       await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(branchBase)}`, {
604:         token,
605:       });
606:       throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Requested branch already exists', {
607:         branch: branchBase,
608:       });
609:     } catch (error) {
610:       if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
611:         const details = error.details ?? {};
612:         if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
613:           return { branch: branchBase, explicit: true };
614:         }
615:       }
616:       if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'branch_exists') {
617:         throw error;
618:       }
619:       throw error;
620:     }
621:   }
622: 
623:   let candidate = branchBase;
624:   for (let index = 1; index <= 50; index += 1) {
625:     try {
626:       await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(candidate)}`, {
627:         token,
628:       });
629:       candidate = `${branchBase}-${index + 1}`;
630:     } catch (error) {
631:       if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
632:         const details = error.details ?? {};
633:         if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
634:           return { branch: candidate, explicit: false };
635:         }
636:       }
637:       throw error;
638:     }
639:   }
640: 
641:   throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Unable to allocate non-colliding generated branch');
642: }

709:       tokenPath

716:       tokenPath
717:     )} ${shellQuote(askpassPath)}; } && trap cleanup EXIT && chmod 700 ${shellQuote(
718:       askpassPath
719:     )} && export GIT_ASKPASS=${shellQuote(

721:     )} GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 && git init -q "$tmp_repo" && cd "$tmp_repo" && git remote add origin ${shellQuote(

792: export function parseDiffNameStatus(output: string): WorkspaceDiffFile[] {
793:   const tokens = output.split('\u0000').filter((token) => token.length > 0);
794: 
795:   const files: WorkspaceDiffFile[] = [];
796: 
797:   for (let index = 0; index < tokens.length; index++) {
798:     const token = tokens[index];
799:     let code = token;
800:     let firstPath: string | null = null;
801: 
802:     const tabIndex = token.indexOf('\t');
803:     if (tabIndex >= 0) {
804:       code = token.slice(0, tabIndex);
805:       const candidatePath = token.slice(tabIndex + 1);
806:       if (candidatePath.length > 0) {
807:         firstPath = candidatePath;
808:       }
809:     }
810: 
811:     if (firstPath === null) {
812:       firstPath = tokens[index + 1] ?? null;
813:       if (firstPath !== null) {
814:         index += 1;
815:       }
816:     }
817: 
818:     if (!firstPath) {
819:       continue;
820:     }
821: 
822:     if (code.startsWith('R') || code.startsWith('C')) {
823:       let secondPath: string | null = tokens[index + 1] ?? null;
824:       if (secondPath !== null) {
825:         index += 1;
826:       }
827: 
828:       if (!secondPath && firstPath.includes('\t')) {
829:         const renameSplit = firstPath.indexOf('\t');
830:         secondPath = firstPath.slice(renameSplit + 1);
831:         firstPath = firstPath.slice(0, renameSplit);
832:       }
833: 
834:       if (!secondPath) {
835:         continue;
836:       }
837: 
838:       files.push({ status: 'renamed', previousPath: firstPath, path: secondPath });
839:       continue;
840:     }
841: 
842:     if (code.startsWith('A')) {
843:       files.push({ status: 'added', path: firstPath });
844:       continue;
845:     }
846: 
847:     if (code.startsWith('D')) {
848:       files.push({ status: 'deleted', path: firstPath });
849:       continue;
850:     }
851: 
852:     files.push({ status: 'modified', path: firstPath });
853:   }
854: 
855:   return files;
856: }

858: export function trimNameStatusToCompleteRecords(output: string): string {
859:   if (!output) {
860:     return output;
861:   }
862: 
863:   const hasTrailingNull = output.endsWith('\u0000');
864:   const splitTokens = output.split('\u0000');
865:   const tokens = hasTrailingNull ? splitTokens.slice(0, -1) : splitTokens.slice(0, -1);
866:   const kept: string[] = [];
867: 
868:   for (let index = 0; index < tokens.length; ) {
869:     const statusToken = tokens[index];
870:     if (!statusToken) {
871:       index += 1;
872:       continue;
873:     }
874: 
875:     const tabIndex = statusToken.indexOf('\t');
876:     if (tabIndex >= 0) {
877:       const code = statusToken.slice(0, tabIndex);
878:       const inlinePath = statusToken.slice(tabIndex + 1);
879: 
880:       if (code.startsWith('R') || code.startsWith('C')) {
881:         if (inlinePath.includes('\t')) {
882:           kept.push(statusToken);
883:           index += 1;
884:           continue;
885:         }
886: 
887:         if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
888:           kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
889:           index += 2;
890:           continue;
891:         }
892: 
893:         break;
894:       }
895: 
896:       if (inlinePath.length > 0) {
897:         kept.push(statusToken);
898:         index += 1;
899:         continue;
900:       }
901: 
902:       if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
903:         kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
904:         index += 2;
905:         continue;
906:       }
907: 
908:       break;
909:     }
910: 
911:     if (statusToken.startsWith('R') || statusToken.startsWith('C')) {
912:       if (index + 2 < tokens.length) {
913:         kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1], tokens[index + 2]);
914:         index += 3;
915:         continue;
916:       }
917: 
918:       break;
919:     }
920: 
921:     if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
922:       kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
923:       index += 2;
924:       continue;
925:     }
926: 
927:     break;
928:   }
929: 
930:   if (kept.length === 0) {
931:     return '';
932:   }
933: 
934:   return `${kept.join('\u0000')}\u0000`;
935: }

937: export function truncateChangedFilesByBytes(changedFiles: WorkspaceDiffFile[], maxBytes: number): TruncatedChangedFiles {
938:   const encoder = new TextEncoder();
939:   const fullJson = JSON.stringify(changedFiles);
940:   const fullBytes = encoder.encode(fullJson).byteLength;
941: 
942:   if (fullBytes <= maxBytes) {
943:     return {
944:       files: changedFiles,
945:       truncated: false,
946:       bytes: fullBytes,
947:       totalBytes: fullBytes,
948:     };
949:   }
950: 
951:   const kept: WorkspaceDiffFile[] = [];
952:   for (const file of changedFiles) {
953:     kept.push(file);
954:     const candidateBytes = encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(kept)).byteLength;
955:     if (candidateBytes > maxBytes) {
956:       kept.pop();
957:       break;
958:     }
959:   }
960: 
961:   return {
962:     files: kept,
963:     truncated: true,
964:     bytes: encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(kept)).byteLength,
965:     totalBytes: fullBytes,
966:   };
967: }

969: export function truncateUtf8(
970:   input: string,
971:   maxBytes: number
972: ): { content: string; truncated: boolean; totalBytes: number; returnedBytes: number } {
973:   const encoder = new TextEncoder();
974:   const decoder = new TextDecoder();
975:   const bytes = encoder.encode(input);
976: 
977:   if (bytes.byteLength <= maxBytes) {
978:     return { content: input, truncated: false, totalBytes: bytes.byteLength, returnedBytes: bytes.byteLength };
979:   }
980: 
981:   const strictDecoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: true, ignoreBOM: false });
982:   let end = maxBytes;
983:   while (end > 0) {
984:     try {
985:       strictDecoder.decode(bytes.subarray(0, end));
986:       break;
987:     } catch {
988:       end -= 1;
989:     }
990:   }
991: 
992:   return {
993:     content: decoder.decode(bytes.subarray(0, end)),
994:     truncated: true,
995:     totalBytes: bytes.byteLength,
996:     returnedBytes: end,
997:   };
998: }
